objective: Implement Sprint 1 of BAGO Code Forge 3B: deterministic request classification before any model call.
constraints: The classifier must use rules before any generative step.
The classifier must not execute shell commands.
The classifier must not inspect files outside the allowed workspace.
The classifier must return only the allowed classification kinds.
SessionManager integration must remain backward compatible.
acceptance: Deterministic classifier handles explain, inspect, create_file, modify_file, fix_error, add_test, refactor_local, generate_project, and unsafe_or_unsupported.
Existing files and missing files are distinguished deterministically.
Blocked requests are identified before model invocation.
SessionManager can attach the classification to the prompt path without breaking chat behavior.
validation_commands: python -m unittest tests.test_sprint_2_contracts tests.test_sprint_3_assets tests.test_sprint_4_surfaces tests.test_sprint_5_validation -v
